name: G-12 validate-all: /doctor --check validate-all --root <dir> delegates to validate-all.sh per the §17 G-12 integration
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: gx
  authoritative_publisher: Acme
  authoritative_url: https://e.t/d
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: "2026-05-04T00:00:00Z"
  content_hash: "sha256:abc123"
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: "MIT"
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/g.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check validate-all --root "$PWD/tree" 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'validate-all: ok' err.txt && echo delegated 1>&2
